message: Fix release compile and run release workflow on macos-26

files.patch:
@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ permissions:
 
 jobs:
   release:
-    runs-on: macos-14
+    runs-on: macos-26
     env:
       APP_NAME: Clearance
       PROJECT_FILE: Clearance.xcodeproj
@@ -22,11 +22,6 @@ jobs:
       - name: Checkout
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
-      - name: Setup Xcode
-        uses: maxim-lobanov/setup-xcode@v1
-        with:
-          xcode-version: "16.2"
-
       - name: Install Tools
         run: brew install xcodegen
